text:
Thomas may refer to:
Thomas Wagner - A member of the 104th Training Corps who died at Trost District.
Thomas - A member of the Survey Corps who notified Commander Erwin about the breach of Wall Rose.
Tom - A soldier used as bait to lure Titans away from other soldiers.
Tom Ksaver - A member of the Warrior Unit who preceded Zeke Yeager as the Beast Titan's inheritor.
